design_philosophy: E1 Anti-AI Design: Premium, high-contrast trading terminal aesthetic. Ditch the spammy betting app look. Use deep obsidian bases, glowing metallic gold and emerald green accents. Functionality meets luxury.

layout.spacing: Generous (p-6, p-8) for containers, tight (gap-4, gap-6) for internal widgets.

structure.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Data correlation, scanability.
structure.cards: Flat background (#141418), 1px subtle border, no heavy box-shadow.

components.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary buttons use bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-bold rounded-lg hover:bg-[#FDE047].
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Dark background (#0A0A0C), 1px solid border (#27272A), focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37].
components.tables: Shadcn based. Striped rows with hover effects. Numbers aligned to right.
components.tabs: Shadcn based. Custom active state with #D4AF37 bottom border.
components.badges: Emerald for 'Live/Won', Red for 'Closed/Lost', Gray for 'Pending'.
components.betting_grid: Custom grid for numbers 0-9 and 00-99. Hover scale up, selected state gets primary border glow.

images.description: Dark midnight blue luxury casino background texture with subtle gold geometric lines. Use as a subtle blend mode overlay or hero backdrop at 30% opacity.
Abstract emerald and obsidian texture with digital numbers. Great for the 'Live Results' or 'Admin' section headers.
Metallic crypto/gold coins on dark background. Use for the Wallet/Deposit feature card.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, betting grid items, deposit buttons, withdraw buttons) MUST have a descriptive 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Unbounded and Manrope from Google Fonts.
Do NOT use pure #000000. Use #0A0A0C as the darkest shade.
Ensure all text contrasting against dark backgrounds passes APCA contrast checks.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard to make it feel like a professional trading/betting terminal.
Use Shadcn UI for standard components but override classes to fit the dark luxury theme (e.g. replacing default grays with #141418 and border-white/5).
The wallet and betting amounts MUST be clearly visible, using a monospace font or tight tracking.
Implement fixed time slots logic for the games (Delhi Bazaar, Shri Ganesh, etc.) per user request.
Admin panel should maintain the same dark theme but clearly distinguish itself, maybe via a different accent color (e.g., subtle blue) for administrative tasks.
